panels.title: Request Rate (Traffic)
panels.description: Golden Signal #2: How much demand is being placed on the system

panels.title: Error Rate
panels.description: Golden Signal #3: Percentage of requests failing with 5xx

panels.title: Service Health (up/down)
panels.description: Prometheus 'up' metric — 1 = scrape succeeded, 0 = target unreachable

panels.title: YOUR TURN: Add Latency panel here (p50 / p95 / p99)

options.content:
## Add a Latency panel here

Replace this text panel with a timeseries panel showing:
- p50: `histogram_quantile(0.50, sum(rate(gateway_request_duration_seconds_bucket[1m])) by (le))`
- p95: `histogram_quantile(0.95, ...)`
- p99: `histogram_quantile(0.99, ...)`

Set unit to **seconds**.

panels.title: YOUR TURN: Add Saturation panel here

options.content:
## Add a Saturation panel here

Replace this text panel with a gauge showing:
- Query: `events_db_pool_size`
- Min: 0, Max: 10
- Thresholds: green < 7, yellow < 9, red ≥ 9

This shows how many DB connections are active out of the pool maximum.
